# GenAIPick

> Honest, hands-on AI tool reviews and tutorials for people who don't code. I pay for AI tools with my own money and tell you what actually works.

## AI Chat & Assistants

- ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini: Which AI Assistant Should You Actually Use? — /blog/chatgpt-vs-claude-vs-gemini/ — I tested all three for everyday tasks—writing emails, planning trips, summarizing articles. The winner surprised me.
- What AI Tools Do Beginners Actually Need? I Tested 8 So You Don't Have To — /blog/essential-ai-tools-for-beginners/ — I paid for 8 AI tools and tested each one for days on real tasks. Here's which ones actually help beginners—and which ones are just hype.

## AI Writing Tools

- Free AI Writing Tools That Don't Suck in 2026 — /blog/free-ai-writing-tools/ — I tested 7 free AI writing tools for two weeks on real work. Here's which ones are genuinely useful—and which waste your time.
- How to Use Jasper AI for Blog Posts (Step-by-Step Tutorial) — /blog/jasper-ai-blog-tutorial/ — I paid $59/month for Jasper AI Pro and wrote 12 blog posts over 4 weeks. Here is the step-by-step process that actually works.
- ChatGPT vs Claude for Content Writing: Which One Actually Helps? — /blog/chatgpt-vs-claude-writing/ — I spent two weeks using both for daily content work. Here is what surprised me about the differences.

## AI Image & Design

- Best AI Image Generators in 2026: I Tested 7 Tools So You Don't Have To — /blog/best-ai-image-generators/ — From Midjourney to Flux, I ran the same prompts through seven generators. The results were... interesting.
- Midjourney vs GPT Image vs Stable Diffusion: Which Makes Better Images in 2026? — /blog/midjourney-vs-dalle-vs-stable-diffusion/ — I ran the same prompts through Midjourney V7, OpenAI's GPT Image 2, and Stable Diffusion 3.5. One tool won on aesthetics, one on accuracy, and one on control.

## AI Video & Audio

- Best AI Video Generators in 2026: Same Clip, 5 Tools — /blog/best-ai-video-generators/ — AI video is finally usable. I tested Runway, Sora, Kling, Pika, and HeyGen with the same prompt. The quality gap is real.
- ElevenLabs Review: The Most Realistic AI Voice I've Ever Heard — /blog/elevenlabs-review/ — I used ElevenLabs for a month to narrate presentations, create voice-overs, and clone my own voice. Here's the honest verdict.

## AI for Business

- Best AI Tools for Small Business in 2026: What Actually Saves Time — /blog/best-ai-tools-small-business/ — I tested 6 AI business tools for 3 weeks on real work. Here's which ones actually saved time and which were just expensive toys.
- Canva AI vs Adobe Firefly: Which Makes Better Marketing Graphics? — /blog/canva-ai-vs-adobe-firefly/ — I needed social media graphics, presentation slides, and a flyer. Both tools claim AI magic. Only one delivered consistently.

## Category Pages

- AI Chat & Assistants — /ai-chat-assistants/ — ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot, DeepSeek—tested with real questions, not marketing demos.
- AI Writing Tools — /ai-writing-tools/ — ChatGPT, Claude, Jasper, Copy.ai, Grammarly AI—tested by real writers, not marketers.
- AI Image & Design — /ai-image-tools/ — Flux Pro, Midjourney v7, DALL-E 3/4, Ideogram 3.0, Stable Diffusion 3—tested with the same prompts.
- AI Video & Audio — /ai-video-tools/ — Runway Gen-4, Kling AI 2.0, Sora, ElevenLabs, HeyGen—tested with real projects.
- AI for Business — /ai-business-tools/ — ChatGPT Enterprise, Claude for Business, Notion AI, Canva AI—reviews based on real business use.
